K1SecretKey.doc: represents a secp256k1 secret key, used for Bitcoin-compatible signing (e.g., MIPS vaults).

from_bytes.doc: creates a secp256k1 secret key from its 32-byte representation.

to_bytes.doc: returns the 32-byte representation of the secret key.

public_key.doc: returns the corresponding secp256k1 public key.

sign_prehashed.doc: signs a pre-hashed 32-byte message, returning a secp256k1 signature.

K1PublicKey.doc: represents a compressed secp256k1 public key (33 bytes).

from_bytes.doc: creates a secp256k1 public key from its 33-byte compressed representation.

to_bytes.doc: returns the 33-byte compressed representation of the public key.

fingerprint.doc: returns the 4-byte fingerprint of the public key.

verify_prehashed.doc: verifies a secp256k1 signature against a pre-hashed message.

K1Signature.doc: represents a secp256k1 ECDSA signature (64 bytes, compact format).

from_bytes.doc: creates a secp256k1 signature from its 64-byte compact representation.

to_bytes.doc: returns the 64-byte compact representation of the signature.

R1SecretKey.doc: represents a secp256r1 (P-256) secret key, used for passkey/WebAuthn signing (e.g., MIPS vaults).

from_bytes.doc: creates a secp256r1 secret key from its 32-byte representation.

to_bytes.doc: returns the 32-byte representation of the secret key.

public_key.doc: returns the corresponding secp256r1 public key.

sign_prehashed.doc: signs a pre-hashed 32-byte message, returning a secp256r1 signature.

R1PublicKey.doc: represents a compressed secp256r1 (P-256) public key (33 bytes).

from_bytes.doc: creates a secp256r1 public key from its 33-byte compressed representation.

to_bytes.doc: returns the 33-byte compressed representation of the public key.

fingerprint.doc: returns the 4-byte fingerprint of the public key.

verify_prehashed.doc: verifies a secp256r1 signature against a pre-hashed message.

R1Signature.doc: represents a secp256r1 (P-256) ECDSA signature (64 bytes, compact format).

from_bytes.doc: creates a secp256r1 signature from its 64-byte compact representation.

to_bytes.doc: returns the 64-byte compact representation of the signature.
